VERSION="v-$\(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S\)"
JAR=/Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch/target/zilaibuy-backend-0.0.1.jar
BUCKET=elasticbeanstalk-us-east-1-579324938856
KEY="zilaibuy-backend-${VERSION}.jar"

$AWS s3 cp $JAR s3://$BUCKET/$KEY 2>&1 | tail -1 && \\
$AWS elasticbeanstalk create-application-version \\
  --application-name zilaibuy-backend \\
  --version-label $VERSION \\
  --source-bundle S3Bucket=$BUCKET,S3Key=$KEY --query "ApplicationVersion.VersionLabel" --output text && \\
$AWS elasticbeanstalk update-environment \\
  --environment-name Zilaibuy-backend-env \\
  --version-label $VERSION --query "Status" --output text)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyWeb push origin main)

Bash(env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch add src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/controller/PaymentController.java && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch commit -m "fix: align points redemption rate with frontend \(10 points = 1 JPY\)

Was 0.05 CNY/point \(too high, caused discount to exceed order total → Stripe 500\).
Now 0.00467 CNY/point matching frontend display of 10 points = 1 JPY.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch push origin main)

Bash(env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch add src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/controller/PaymentController.java && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch commit -m "feat: charge in JPY instead of CNY for Stripe payments

JPY is zero-decimal in Stripe \(no *100\). Convert totalCny/shippingFeeCny
to JPY before creating PaymentIntent. Discount = pointsUsed/10 JPY.
Min charge ¥50 \(Stripe JPY minimum\). Points earned = chargeJpy \(1:1\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:/usr/local/bin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch push origin main)

Bash(env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch add src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/repository/ForwardingParcelRepository.java src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/service/ForwardingParcelService.java && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'

Bash(env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch add src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/repository/ForwardingParcelRepository.java src/main/java/com/zilai/zilaibuy/service/ForwardingParcelService.java && env -i HOME="$HOME" PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin" git -C /Users/xwu30/Projects/zilaibuyProxySearch commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: use MAX existing sequence instead of COUNT for inbound_code generation

COUNT breaks after parcel deletions. MAX\(last segment\) always returns
the highest number ever used, so seq = MAX+1 is always collision-free.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
